series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains all documentation related to a customer''s request to cancel his or her vehicle registration including: BMV Form 4311 (Customer Request to Cancel Registration), BMV Form 4870 (Plate Cancellation Complete/Court Reject Notification), and any additional correspondence used to process the cancellation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: imaged and validated in Custom Processing Imaging Client (CPIC) system ; Electronic: in BMV''s Custom Processing Imaging Client (CPIC) system three years following date of cancellation or rejection
